noCategories: No {{kind}} categories yet—create them under Categories
tagsEmptyEnd: create tags to select them here and filter analytics.
editBudgetDesc: Set a spending ceiling for this month
editBudgetDefaultHint: Without a month-specific row, the ledger default of ¥{{amount}} applies. Saving here writes an override for the selected month only.
editBudgetClearOverride: Clear this month’s override (use default monthly budget)
editBudgetNoOverride: No month-specific budget row for this period
installmentHint: Split equally or enter per-month amounts; creates linked expenses you can delete as a group.
installmentCustomPlaceholder: Comma-separated amounts, must match month count and sum to total
installmentInvalidMonths: Months must be an integer from 2 to 60
installmentInvalidCustom: Custom amounts count must match months
installmentSumMismatch: Amounts must sum to the total above
projectCreateDesc: Group spending for a trip, renovation, course, etc.
budgetLedgerHint: Only expenses in this ledger linked to the project count toward the cap
monthApplyHint: Open again in another month to set values there
